---
title: "Publications"
toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  cache: true
---

```{r}
#| results: asis
library(scholar)
library(dplyr)
library(glue)

pubs <- get_publications("6rW2FGoAAAAJ") |>
  filter(!is.na(year), year > 2018, journal != "") |>
  filter(!journal %in% c("University of Sussex", "")) |>
  arrange(desc(year))

dois <- c(
  "Repeated polyploidization shapes divergence in floral morphology in Lithophragma bolanderi (Saxifragaceae)" = "https://doi.org/10.1073/pnas.2505119122",
  "Greater Thermal Plasticity Toward Heterogeneous Range\u2010Edge Environments of Three Hypericum Species" = "https://doi.org/10.1002/ece3.73486",
  "Nectar and floral morphology differ in evolutionary potential in novel pollination environments" = "https://doi.org/10.1111/nph.19780",
  "The IDH-TAU-EGFR triad defines the neovascular landscape of diffuse gliomas" = "https://doi.org/10.1126/scitranslmed.aax1501"
)

years <- sort(unique(pubs$year), decreasing = TRUE)

for (yr in years) {
  cat(paste0("\n## ", yr, "\n\n"))
  yr_pubs <- filter(pubs, year == yr)
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(yr_pubs))) {
    p <- yr_pubs[i, ]
    authors <- gsub("A Romero-Bravo|A Romero\u2010Bravo", "**A Romero-Bravo**", p$author)
    doi <- dois[p$title]
    doi_link <- ifelse(!is.na(doi), glue(" [Read it]({doi})"), "")
    cat(glue("{authors} ({yr}). {p$title}. *{p$journal}*, {p$number}. **Citations: {p$cites}**{doi_link}\n\n"))
  }
}
```
